positive: A minimalist, high-contrast stylized illustration of a majestic celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting serenely amongst glowing autumn maple leaves and abstract geometric patterns. The fox should have clean, stylized lines and a silhouette that suggests grace and power. Composition is centered, facing forward. Use a limited, warm color palette dominated by deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, cream, and metallic gold accents. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and modern Japanese folk art, optimized for screen printing or direct textile transfer. Strong backlighting from the setting sun creates defined edges. Clean lines, vector art feel, high resolution, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, low quality, watermark, logo, text, dirty, grainy, noise, poor anatomy, bad fingers, signature, cartoon, messy, extra limbs
